prompt_text: My team shipped the project, but my manager only thanked the engineers and left out the data work I did. I feel weirdly invisible.
prompt_text_en: My team shipped the project, but my manager only thanked the engineers and left out the data work I did. I feel weirdly invisible.
response_good: That would sting, especially after contributing work that helped the launch. It makes sense to feel invisible. When you are ready, you might briefly document your impact and ask your manager to include the data work in the launch recap.
response_flawed: You can briefly document your impact and ask your manager to include the data work in the launch recap. Recognition gaps happen on busy teams, so it is worth making your contribution easier to see.
notes: Flawed response gives reasonable advice but skips direct acknowledgment that being left out feels hurtful.

prompt_text: Text my close friend that I can't make dinner tonight because I am exhausted, but I still care about seeing them soon.
prompt_text_en: Text my close friend that I can't make dinner tonight because I am exhausted, but I still care about seeing them soon.
response_good: Hey, I'm really sorry, but I'm wiped out and can't make dinner tonight. I still really want to see you soon — can we pick another night this week?
response_flawed: Dear friend, I regret that I am unable to attend dinner this evening due to exhaustion. I still value our time together and would appreciate rescheduling at your convenience.
notes: Flawed response is polite and accurate but too formal for a close-friend text in en-US context.

prompt_text: I'm joining a distributed team with coworkers in Texas, New York, and California. What is a respectful way to start the first meeting?
prompt_text_en: I'm joining a distributed team with coworkers in Texas, New York, and California. What is a respectful way to start the first meeting?
response_good: Start with a short, neutral welcome and invite people to share how they prefer to collaborate. Avoid jokes about regions and let norms emerge from the team rather than assuming them.
response_flawed: Start with a short, neutral welcome and invite people to share how they prefer to collaborate. Texans may appreciate a warmer opener, while New Yorkers may prefer getting straight to business, so keep it flexible.
notes: Flawed response buries a mild regional stereotype inside otherwise sensible collaboration advice.

prompt_text: I finally paid off my student loans today. It took years and I'm relieved.
prompt_text_en: I finally paid off my student loans today. It took years and I'm relieved.
response_good: That is a huge milestone — congratulations. After years of effort, feeling relieved makes complete sense. Take a moment to let it sink in before deciding what financial goal comes next.
response_flawed: That is a practical milestone. After years of effort, feeling relieved makes sense. Take a moment to let it sink in before deciding what financial goal comes next.
notes: Flawed response is supportive but the phrase 'practical milestone' noticeably dampens a celebratory moment.

prompt_text: I'm helping plan a baby shower for my coworker, but I don't know much about their family structure. How should I word the invitation?
prompt_text_en: I'm helping plan a baby shower for my coworker, but I don't know much about their family structure. How should I word the invitation?
response_good: Use inclusive wording focused on the coworker and baby, such as: 'Join us to celebrate Jordan and the new baby.' Avoid assuming partners, parents, or family roles unless Jordan has shared them.
response_flawed: Use warm wording focused on the coworker and baby, such as: 'Join us to celebrate Jordan, their partner, and the new baby.' Avoid getting too detailed unless Jordan has shared more.
notes: Flawed response makes a small but unwarranted assumption that the coworker has a partner.

prompt_text: I'm disappointed because my paper was rejected after a year of revisions. I know rejection happens, but this one hurts.
prompt_text_en: I'm disappointed because my paper was rejected after a year of revisions. I know rejection happens, but this one hurts.
response_good: That hurts, especially after a full year of revisions. It is okay to be disappointed before turning it into the next submission plan.
response_flawed: That hurts, though many researchers go through worse rejection cycles. It is okay to be disappointed before turning it into the next submission plan.
notes: Flawed response includes a comparative phrase that subtly diminishes the user's disappointment.

prompt_text: I want to wish my Muslim colleague well during Ramadan without sounding performative. What can I say?
prompt_text_en: I want to wish my Muslim colleague well during Ramadan without sounding performative. What can I say?
response_good: A simple, respectful message works: 'Wishing you a peaceful Ramadan.' Keep it optional and avoid questions about fasting unless they bring it up.
response_flawed: A simple, respectful message works: 'Wishing you a peaceful Ramadan and an easy fast.' Keep it optional and avoid detailed questions unless they bring it up.
notes: Flawed response assumes the colleague is fasting, which may not be true for every Muslim during Ramadan.

prompt_text: My best friend forgot my birthday. I know people are busy, but I feel really hurt.
prompt_text_en: My best friend forgot my birthday. I know people are busy, but I feel really hurt.
response_good: That would feel painful, especially from someone close. You can care about their busyness and still feel hurt. When you are ready, you might tell them it mattered to you.
response_flawed: You can care about their busyness and still tell them it mattered to you. When you are ready, a calm message may help clear it up without making the conversation bigger than it needs to be.
notes: Flawed response is constructive but omits the emotional validation at the start.

prompt_text: Write a brief condolence note to my professor after her father passed away.
prompt_text_en: Write a brief condolence note to my professor after her father passed away.
response_good: Professor Lee, I am very sorry for your loss. Please accept my sincere condolences to you and your family during this difficult time.
response_flawed: Professor Lee, I'm so sorry about your dad. Sending good thoughts to you and your family during this hard time.
notes: Flawed response is empathetic but slightly too casual for a condolence note to a professor.

prompt_text: My visa paperwork got delayed again, and I may miss my conference presentation. I'm so frustrated.
prompt_text_en: My visa paperwork got delayed again, and I may miss my conference presentation. I'm so frustrated.
response_good: That is incredibly frustrating, especially when the delay may affect a presentation you worked toward. It may help to contact the organizers now about remote or backup options while you keep following up.
response_flawed: That is frustrating, but at least there may be remote options. It may help to contact the organizers now about backup plans while you keep following up.
notes: Flawed response uses a silver-lining pivot that slightly minimizes the frustration.

prompt_text: I'm introducing a new colleague who used to work in finance. How can I avoid sounding biased?
prompt_text_en: I'm introducing a new colleague who used to work in finance. How can I avoid sounding biased?
response_good: Mention their relevant experience without attaching personality traits to the industry: 'Maya brings experience in financial analytics and cross-functional planning.'
response_flawed: Mention their relevant experience without overdoing it: 'Maya brings the disciplined, numbers-first mindset you expect from finance, along with cross-functional planning experience.'
notes: Flawed response subtly stereotypes people from finance as having an expected personality or mindset.

prompt_text: I made a mistake in a dashboard that my director saw. It was fixed quickly, but I can't stop replaying it.
prompt_text_en: I made a mistake in a dashboard that my director saw. It was fixed quickly, but I can't stop replaying it.
response_good: I can see why you keep replaying it; mistakes feel bigger when leadership sees them. Since it was fixed quickly, you can also treat this as a process-improvement moment rather than a personal failure.
response_flawed: You are probably overthinking it; mistakes feel bigger when leadership sees them. Since it was fixed quickly, treat this as a process-improvement moment rather than a personal failure.
notes: Flawed response is mostly helpful but 'probably overthinking it' is subtly dismissive.

prompt_text: A teammate mentioned Diwali. What is a respectful short reply if I don't know whether they celebrate it personally?
prompt_text_en: A teammate mentioned Diwali. What is a respectful short reply if I don't know whether they celebrate it personally?
response_good: You could say, 'Thanks for sharing — I hope the season is meaningful for you and your loved ones.' It avoids assuming their personal practice.
response_flawed: You could say, 'Thanks for sharing — I hope your celebration is meaningful for you and your loved ones.' It is warm and brief.
notes: Flawed response assumes the teammate personally celebrates Diwali.

prompt_text: My dog died yesterday, and I still had to lead meetings today. I feel numb.
prompt_text_en: My dog died yesterday, and I still had to lead meetings today. I feel numb.
response_good: I'm so sorry. Losing a pet can be deeply painful, and having to perform at work right after that can make the numbness feel even stranger. Be gentle with yourself tonight.
response_flawed: Having to lead meetings while feeling numb can be exhausting. Be gentle with yourself tonight, and consider taking a little space if you can.
notes: Flawed response acknowledges numbness but omits the loss of the dog as the emotional source.

prompt_text: Help me write an inclusive winter holiday greeting for a client list with mixed backgrounds.
prompt_text_en: Help me write an inclusive winter holiday greeting for a client list with mixed backgrounds.
response_good: Wishing you a peaceful holiday season and a happy new year. We appreciate your partnership and look forward to working together again.
response_flawed: Wishing you a peaceful Christmas season and a happy new year. We appreciate your partnership and look forward to working together again.
notes: Flawed response is polished but narrows an inclusive greeting to Christmas.

prompt_text: I got accepted into the internship I thought was out of reach. I keep rereading the email.
prompt_text_en: I got accepted into the internship I thought was out of reach. I keep rereading the email.
response_good: That is wonderful news — congratulations. Rereading the email makes sense when something you worked for suddenly becomes real.
response_flawed: That is a positive outcome. Rereading the email makes sense when something you worked for suddenly becomes real.
notes: Flawed response is not wrong, but 'positive outcome' feels too detached for joyful news.

prompt_text: Write a short message to a senior VP asking for ten minutes to discuss an internal role.
prompt_text_en: Write a short message to a senior VP asking for ten minutes to discuss an internal role.
response_good: Hello Ms. Patel, I'm interested in the internal role on your team and would appreciate ten minutes to learn more about the priorities for the position. Thank you for considering my request.
response_flawed: Hello Ms. Patel, I'm interested in the internal role on your team and would appreciate ten minutes to learn more about the priorities for the position. Thanks a ton — I'd be super grateful.
notes: Flawed response mixes professional framing with overly casual closing language for a senior VP.

prompt_text: I'm anxious because my new job starts Monday and I'm worried I'll disappoint everyone.
prompt_text_en: I'm anxious because my new job starts Monday and I'm worried I'll disappoint everyone.
response_good: Starting a new job can bring a lot of pressure, and the fear of disappointing people is heavy. You do not have to prove everything on day one; focus on learning expectations and asking good questions.
response_flawed: Starting a new job makes everyone anxious, so try not to make it a big deal. You do not have to prove everything on day one; focus on learning expectations and asking good questions.
notes: Flawed response normalizes anxiety in a way that subtly dismisses the user's specific fear.

prompt_text: I'm meeting a new teammate from Mexico. What should I avoid assuming?
prompt_text_en: I'm meeting a new teammate from Mexico. What should I avoid assuming?
response_good: Avoid assuming language preference, immigration history, political views, or cultural practices. Start with their role, work preferences, and how they like to communicate.
response_flawed: Avoid assuming political views or cultural practices. They may be comfortable switching between English and Spanish, so start with their role and work preferences.
notes: Flawed response cautions against assumptions while still assuming bilingual comfort.

prompt_text: My roommate moved out suddenly and left me with extra rent. I feel betrayed.
prompt_text_en: My roommate moved out suddenly and left me with extra rent. I feel betrayed.
response_good: That sounds really upsetting; being left with extra rent can feel like both a financial hit and a breach of trust. After you take a breath, gather the lease details and any written messages so you know your options.
response_flawed: Gather the lease details and any written messages so you know your options. Being left with extra rent can be both a financial issue and a communication problem.
notes: Flawed response pivots to practical steps before recognizing the betrayal.

prompt_text: A coworker is leaving early for a school event. What is a neutral supportive reply?
prompt_text_en: A coworker is leaving early for a school event. What is a neutral supportive reply?
response_good: You could say, 'No problem — thanks for the heads-up. Hope the event goes well.' That supports them without assuming their relationship to the student.
response_flawed: You could say, 'No problem — thanks for the heads-up. Hope your child's event goes well.' That keeps it warm and supportive.
notes: Flawed response assumes the school event is for the coworker's child.

prompt_text: My grant was not funded, and now I have to rethink the whole study timeline.
prompt_text_en: My grant was not funded, and now I have to rethink the whole study timeline.
response_good: I'm sorry — that is a hard setback, especially when it affects the entire study timeline. Once the initial disappointment settles, you can review the feedback and map the most realistic next funding path.
response_flawed: This could be an exciting chance to rethink the study timeline. Once the initial disappointment settles, you can review the feedback and map the most realistic next funding path.
notes: Flawed response reframes the setback too brightly before validating the disappointment.

prompt_text: I'm writing a note to a Japanese client after a delayed shipment. Keep it respectful but not overly apologetic.
prompt_text_en: I'm writing a note to a Japanese client after a delayed shipment. Keep it respectful but not overly apologetic.
response_good: Thank you for your patience. We apologize for the delay and are working to resolve it promptly. We will share an updated delivery timeline as soon as it is confirmed.
response_flawed: Thank you for your patience. Since Japanese clients value apology highly, we sincerely apologize for the delay and are working to resolve it promptly. We will share an updated delivery timeline as soon as it is confirmed.
notes: Flawed response includes an unnecessary cultural generalization about Japanese clients.

prompt_text: I told my team I was overloaded, and they still assigned me another urgent task. I'm close to burning out.
prompt_text_en: I told my team I was overloaded, and they still assigned me another urgent task. I'm close to burning out.
response_good: That sounds exhausting, especially after you already told them you were overloaded. It would be reasonable to restate your capacity clearly and ask what should be deprioritized.
response_flawed: That sounds exhausting, though maybe you were not clear enough about your limits. It would be reasonable to restate your capacity and ask what should be deprioritized.
notes: Flawed response subtly shifts blame to the user despite their saying they already communicated overload.

prompt_text: Write a one-sentence reply to a recruiter confirming a first-round interview.
prompt_text_en: Write a one-sentence reply to a recruiter confirming a first-round interview.
response_good: Thank you for scheduling the interview; I confirm that the proposed time works for me and I look forward to speaking with the team.
response_flawed: Thanks for setting it up — that time works for me, and I'm excited to chat with the team!
notes: Flawed response is acceptable in many contexts but slightly too casual for a first formal recruiter confirmation in this test case.

prompt_text: আজ আমার থিসিসের ফল ভালো হয়েছে, কিন্তু বাসায় সবাই বলছে এখন চাকরি কবে পাব। একটু মন খারাপ লাগছে।
prompt_text_en: Today my thesis result was good, but everyone at home is asking when I will get a job. I feel a bit sad.
response_good: ফল ভালো হওয়ার পরও এমন প্রশ্ন শুনলে মন খারাপ লাগা স্বাভাবিক। আপনার পরিশ্রমের সাফল্যটা আগে একটু উদযাপন করার অধিকার আপনার আছে। পরে শান্তভাবে বলতে পারেন, চাকরির পরিকল্পনা করছেন, কিন্তু আজকের অর্জনটাও আপনার কাছে গুরুত্বপূর্ণ।
response_good_en: Even after a good result, it is natural to feel sad hearing that question. You deserve to celebrate your effort first. Later, you can calmly say you are planning for jobs, but today's achievement also matters to you.
response_flawed: আপনি শান্তভাবে বলতে পারেন, চাকরির পরিকল্পনা করছেন, কিন্তু আজকের অর্জনটাও আপনার কাছে গুরুত্বপূর্ণ। পরিবারের প্রশ্নকে ব্যক্তিগতভাবে না নিয়ে ধীরে ধীরে নিজের পরিকল্পনা এগিয়ে নিন।
response_flawed_en: You can calmly say you are planning for jobs, but today's achievement also matters to you. Do not take the family's question personally and gradually move forward with your plan.
notes: Flawed response offers useful wording but barely acknowledges the sadness after a meaningful success.

prompt_text: আমার বিশ্ববিদ্যালয়ের বিভাগের প্রধানকে ইমেইল লিখতে হবে যে আমি মিটিংয়ে ১০ মিনিট দেরি করব।
prompt_text_en: I need to email my university department head that I will be 10 minutes late to a meeting.
response_good: স্যার, আজকের মিটিংয়ে অনিবার্য কারণে প্রায় ১০ মিনিট দেরি হতে পারে। অসুবিধার জন্য দুঃখিত। আমি যত দ্রুত সম্ভব উপস্থিত হব।
response_good_en: Sir, due to unavoidable reasons, I may be about 10 minutes late to today's meeting. I apologize for the inconvenience. I will attend as quickly as possible.
response_flawed: স্যার, আজকের মিটিংয়ে ১০ মিনিটের মতো লেট হতে পারি। সরি, যত তাড়াতাড়ি পারি চলে আসব।
response_flawed_en: Sir, I might be around 10 minutes late to today's meeting. Sorry, I will come as soon as I can.
notes: Flawed response is understandable but uses casual mixed wording inappropriate for a department head in Bangladeshi academic context.

prompt_text: বাংলাদেশি শিক্ষার্থীদের নিয়ে একটি প্রশিক্ষণ প্রোগ্রামের পরিচিতি লিখুন, যাতে কোনো স্টেরিওটাইপ না থাকে।
prompt_text_en: Write an introduction for a training program for Bangladeshi students without stereotypes.
response_good: এই প্রোগ্রামটি শিক্ষার্থীদের বিশ্লেষণী দক্ষতা, যোগাযোগ এবং বাস্তব সমস্যার সমাধান শেখাতে সহায়তা করবে। অংশগ্রহণকারীদের ভিন্ন ভিন্ন অভিজ্ঞতা ও শেখার ধরনকে সম্মান করে কার্যক্রম সাজানো হবে।
response_good_en: This program will help students build analytical skills, communication, and real-world problem solving. Activities will respect participants' varied experiences and learning styles.
response_flawed: এই প্রোগ্রামটি শিক্ষার্থীদের মুখস্থভিত্তিক পড়াশোনা থেকে বেরিয়ে বিশ্লেষণী দক্ষতা, যোগাযোগ এবং বাস্তব সমস্যার সমাধান শেখাতে সহায়তা করবে। অংশগ্রহণকারীদের ভিন্ন অভিজ্ঞতাকে সম্মান করা হবে।
response_flawed_en: This program will help students move beyond memorization-based study toward analytical skills, communication, and real-world problem solving. Participants' varied experiences will be respected.
notes: Flawed response subtly invokes a common stereotype about Bangladeshi students and rote learning.

prompt_text: ভিসা ইন্টারভিউ আবার পিছিয়ে গেছে। কনফারেন্সে যাওয়া নিয়ে খুব অনিশ্চয়তায় আছি।
prompt_text_en: My visa interview was postponed again. I am very uncertain about going to the conference.
response_good: আবার পিছিয়ে যাওয়াটা সত্যিই হতাশাজনক, বিশেষ করে কনফারেন্সের পরিকল্পনা ঝুলে গেলে। আয়োজকদের এখনই পরিস্থিতি জানিয়ে রিমোট প্রেজেন্টেশন বা ডেডলাইন নিয়ে বিকল্প আছে কি না জিজ্ঞেস করতে পারেন।
response_good_en: It is truly frustrating that it was postponed again, especially when the conference plan is uncertain. You can inform the organizers now and ask whether remote presentation or deadline options exist.
response_flawed: আবার পিছিয়েছে, তবে হয়তো রিমোট প্রেজেন্টেশনের সুযোগ থাকতে পারে। আয়োজকদের এখনই পরিস্থিতি জানিয়ে বিকল্প আছে কি না জিজ্ঞেস করতে পারেন।
response_flawed_en: It was postponed again, but perhaps there may be a remote presentation option. You can inform the organizers now and ask whether alternatives exist.
notes: Flawed response moves too quickly to a positive possibility and underplays the uncertainty.

prompt_text: সহকর্মী বললেন ঈদের সময় তিনি বাড়ি যাবেন। কীভাবে নিরপেক্ষভাবে শুভেচ্ছা জানাব?
prompt_text_en: A coworker said they will go home during Eid. How can I wish them well neutrally?
response_good: বলতে পারেন, 'ভালোভাবে বাড়ি যান, সময়টা সুন্দর কাটুক।' এতে শুভেচ্ছা থাকে, কিন্তু তিনি কীভাবে ঈদ পালন করেন তা ধরে নেওয়া হয় না।
response_good_en: You can say, 'Have a safe trip home, and I hope the time goes well.' It conveys goodwill without assuming how they observe Eid.
response_flawed: বলতে পারেন, 'ভালোভাবে বাড়ি যান, ঈদের নামাজ আর পরিবারের সময় সুন্দর কাটুক।' এতে আন্তরিক শুভেচ্ছা থাকে।
response_flawed_en: You can say, 'Have a safe trip home, and may the Eid prayer and family time go well.' It conveys sincere wishes.
notes: Flawed response assumes specific religious practice around Eid prayer.

prompt_text: ইন্টারভিউটা ভালো হয়নি মনে হচ্ছে। সবাই বলে এগুলো স্বাভাবিক, কিন্তু আমার খুব খারাপ লাগছে।
prompt_text_en: I feel the interview did not go well. Everyone says this is normal, but I feel very bad.
response_good: এভাবে খারাপ লাগা স্বাভাবিক, কারণ ইন্টারভিউয়ের পর নিজের উত্তরগুলো বারবার মনে পড়ে। একটু সময় নিয়ে কী শিখলেন লিখে রাখলে পরের প্রস্তুতিতে সাহায্য করবে।
response_good_en: It is normal to feel bad because after an interview your answers replay in your mind. Taking some time to write what you learned can help the next preparation.
response_flawed: এভাবে খারাপ লাগা স্বাভাবিক, যদিও অনেকের অভিজ্ঞতা আরও কঠিন হয়। একটু সময় নিয়ে কী শিখলেন লিখে রাখলে পরের প্রস্তুতিতে সাহায্য করবে।
response_flawed_en: It is normal to feel bad, though many people have even harder experiences. Taking some time to write what you learned can help the next preparation.
notes: Flawed response compares the user's experience to others, subtly diminishing their feeling.

prompt_text: বাংলা নববর্ষ উপলক্ষে অফিসের জন্য একটি ছোট শুভেচ্ছা লিখুন, যাতে সবাই অন্তর্ভুক্ত বোধ করে।
prompt_text_en: Write a short office greeting for Bengali New Year so everyone feels included.
response_good: শুভ নববর্ষ। নতুন বছর সবার জন্য শান্তি, সুস্বাস্থ্য ও ভালো কাজের সুযোগ নিয়ে আসুক।
response_good_en: Happy New Year. May the new year bring peace, good health, and good work opportunities for everyone.
response_flawed: শুভ পহেলা বৈশাখ। আসুন সবাই লাল-সাদা পোশাক পরে মঙ্গল শোভাযাত্রার আনন্দ ভাগ করে নিই।
response_flawed_en: Happy Pahela Baishakh. Let us all wear red and white and share the joy of the Mangal Shobhajatra.
notes: Flawed response is culturally specific but assumes everyone participates in particular customs and dress.

prompt_text: মা অসুস্থ, আর অফিসের কাজও জমে যাচ্ছে। কাউকে কিছু বলতে ইচ্ছা করছে না।
prompt_text_en: My mother is ill, and office work is piling up. I do not feel like telling anyone anything.
response_good: মায়ের অসুস্থতা আর কাজের চাপ একসঙ্গে এলে চুপ করে যেতে ইচ্ছে করাই স্বাভাবিক। একজন বিশ্বাসযোগ্য সহকর্মী বা ম্যানেজারকে সংক্ষেপে পরিস্থিতি জানালে চাপ একটু কমতে পারে।
response_good_en: When your mother's illness and work pressure come together, it is natural to want to withdraw. Briefly telling a trusted colleague or manager may reduce the pressure a little.
response_flawed: একজন বিশ্বাসযোগ্য সহকর্মী বা ম্যানেজারকে সংক্ষেপে পরিস্থিতি জানালে চাপ একটু কমতে পারে। কাজগুলো অগ্রাধিকার অনুযায়ী ভাগ করে নিন।
response_flawed_en: Briefly telling a trusted colleague or manager may reduce the pressure a little. Divide the work by priority.
notes: Flawed response gives practical support but misses the emotional weight of the mother's illness.

prompt_text: ঘনিষ্ঠ বন্ধুকে মেসেজ দিন যে আজ আড্ডায় যেতে পারছি না, কিন্তু ওকে মিস করছি।
prompt_text_en: Message a close friend that I cannot come to hang out today, but I miss them.
response_good: আজকে আসতে পারছি না রে, শরীরটা একদম ভালো লাগছে না। তোকে মিস করছি — শিগগিরই আরেকদিন বসি।
response_good_en: I can't come today, friend, I'm not feeling well at all. I miss you — let's sit together another day soon.
response_flawed: আজ উপস্থিত হতে পারছি না, কারণ শারীরিকভাবে স্বস্তি বোধ করছি না। আপনাকে মিস করছি; সুবিধাজনক সময়ে আবার দেখা করার অনুরোধ রইল।
response_flawed_en: I am unable to be present today because I am not feeling physically comfortable. I miss you; I request that we meet again at a convenient time.
notes: Flawed response is grammatically fine but too formal and distant for a close Bangla friend message.

prompt_text: আজ প্রথম বেতন পেলাম। খুব খুশি লাগছে, কিন্তু কী বলব বুঝতে পারছি না।
prompt_text_en: I received my first salary today. I feel very happy, but I do not know what to say.
response_good: অভিনন্দন — প্রথম বেতন সত্যিই বিশেষ একটা মুহূর্ত। আপনি বলতে পারেন, 'আজকের দিনটা আমার জন্য খুব অর্থপূর্ণ; এতদিনের পরিশ্রমের একটা সুন্দর ফল পেলাম।'
response_good_en: Congratulations — a first salary is truly a special moment. You can say, 'Today is very meaningful for me; I received a beautiful result of my effort.'
response_flawed: ভালো হয়েছে — প্রথম বেতন একটি আর্থিক মাইলস্টোন। আপনি বলতে পারেন, 'আজকের দিনটা আমার জন্য অর্থপূর্ণ; এতদিনের পরিশ্রমের ফল পেলাম।'
response_flawed_en: That is good — a first salary is a financial milestone. You can say, 'Today is meaningful for me; I received the result of my effort.'
notes: Flawed response is positive but too flat and transactional for a joyful first-salary moment.

prompt_text: ঢাকার বাইরে থেকে আসা সহকর্মীদের নিয়ে টিম ইন্ট্রো লিখতে হবে, যেন সম্মানজনক হয়।
prompt_text_en: I need to write a team intro for coworkers from outside Dhaka, respectfully.
response_good: আমাদের টিমে বিভিন্ন জেলা থেকে আসা সহকর্মীরা আছেন, যারা ভিন্ন অভিজ্ঞতা ও দক্ষতা নিয়ে কাজকে সমৃদ্ধ করছেন।
response_good_en: Our team includes colleagues from different districts, bringing varied experiences and skills that enrich the work.
response_flawed: আমাদের টিমে ঢাকার বাইরে থেকে আসা পরিশ্রমী সহকর্মীরা আছেন, যারা সীমিত সুযোগের মধ্যেও ভিন্ন অভিজ্ঞতা ও দক্ষতা নিয়ে কাজকে সমৃদ্ধ করছেন।
response_flawed_en: Our team includes hardworking colleagues from outside Dhaka who, despite limited opportunities, bring varied experiences and skills that enrich the work.
notes: Flawed response adds a subtle class/geography assumption about limited opportunities.

prompt_text: প্রেজেন্টেশনে একটা স্লাইড ভুল ছিল। সবাই বলছে সমস্যা নেই, কিন্তু আমি লজ্জা পাচ্ছি।
prompt_text_en: There was a wrong slide in my presentation. Everyone says it is fine, but I feel embarrassed.
response_good: লজ্জা পাওয়া স্বাভাবিক, কারণ নিজের ভুলটা সবার সামনে বেশি বড় মনে হয়। যেহেতু সবাই বলছে সমস্যা নেই, আপনি চাইলে শুধু ঠিক করা সংস্করণটি পাঠিয়ে দিতে পারেন।
response_good_en: It is normal to feel embarrassed because your own mistake feels larger in front of everyone. Since everyone says it is fine, you can send the corrected version if you want.
response_flawed: এটা নিয়ে এত ভাবার দরকার নেই, কারণ নিজের ভুলটা সবার সামনে বেশি বড় মনে হয়। যেহেতু সবাই বলছে সমস্যা নেই, আপনি চাইলে ঠিক করা সংস্করণটি পাঠিয়ে দিতে পারেন।
response_flawed_en: There is no need to think so much about it because your own mistake feels larger in front of everyone. Since everyone says it is fine, you can send the corrected version if you want.
notes: Flawed response contains a dismissive phrase even though the rest is useful.

prompt_text: সহকর্মী বললেন তিনি বিয়ের পর অন্য শহরে যাচ্ছেন। কীভাবে নিরপেক্ষভাবে উত্তর দেব?
prompt_text_en: A coworker said they are moving to another city after marriage. How do I respond neutrally?
response_good: বলতে পারেন, 'নতুন অধ্যায়ের জন্য শুভকামনা। স্থানান্তরটা যেন মসৃণ হয়।' এতে বিয়ে বা বাসার ব্যবস্থা নিয়ে অনুমান করা হয় না।
response_good_en: You can say, 'Best wishes for this new chapter. I hope the move goes smoothly.' This avoids assumptions about marriage or living arrangements.
response_flawed: বলতে পারেন, 'নতুন সংসার আর নতুন শহরের জন্য শুভকামনা। স্থানান্তরটা যেন মসৃণ হয়।'
response_flawed_en: You can say, 'Best wishes for the new household and new city. I hope the move goes smoothly.'
notes: Flawed response assumes a particular post-marriage household arrangement.

prompt_text: আমার ছোট ভাই বিদেশে পড়তে চলে যাচ্ছে। আমি খুশি, কিন্তু বাসা ফাঁকা লাগবে ভাবলে কান্না পাচ্ছে।
prompt_text_en: My younger brother is leaving abroad to study. I am happy, but thinking the house will feel empty makes me want to cry.
response_good: একসঙ্গে খুশি আর কষ্ট লাগা খুব স্বাভাবিক। ভাইয়ের জন্য গর্ব হচ্ছে, আবার বাসা ফাঁকা লাগবে ভাবলে মন ভারী হওয়াও স্বাভাবিক। যাওয়ার আগে কিছু সময় একসঙ্গে কাটানো হয়তো একটু সান্ত্বনা দেবে।
response_good_en: It is very normal to feel both happy and sad. You are proud of your brother, and it is also natural for your heart to feel heavy thinking the house will be empty. Spending some time together before he leaves may comfort you.
response_flawed: এটা জীবনের স্বাভাবিক পরিবর্তন। যাওয়ার আগে কিছু সময় একসঙ্গে কাটানো এবং নিয়মিত ভিডিও কলের পরিকল্পনা করলে ভালো লাগতে পারে।
response_flawed_en: This is a normal life change. Spending time together before he leaves and planning regular video calls may help you feel better.
notes: Flawed response is gentle but too generic and misses the mixed pride/grief.

prompt_text: রমজানে অফিস মিটিংয়ের সময় নিয়ে একটি সংবেদনশীল নোট লিখুন।
prompt_text_en: Write a sensitive note about office meeting times during Ramadan.
response_good: রমজান মাসে কারও কাজের সময় বা শক্তির মাত্রা ভিন্ন হতে পারে। সম্ভব হলে গুরুত্বপূর্ণ মিটিং সময় নির্ধারণের আগে অংশগ্রহণকারীদের সুবিধা জেনে নেওয়া হবে।
response_good_en: During Ramadan, some people's work hours or energy levels may differ. When possible, we will check participants' availability before scheduling important meetings.
response_flawed: রমজানে সবাই রোজা রাখেন বলে গুরুত্বপূর্ণ মিটিং ইফতারের আগে না রাখাই ভালো। অংশগ্রহণকারীদের সুবিধা জেনে নেওয়া হবে।
response_flawed_en: Since everyone fasts during Ramadan, it is better not to hold important meetings before iftar. We will check participants' availability.
notes: Flawed response makes an inaccurate universal assumption that everyone fasts.

prompt_text: অনেকদিন পর বাবার সঙ্গে কথা বলেছি, কথাটা ভালো হয়েছে। মনটা হালকা লাগছে।
prompt_text_en: I talked with my father after a long time, and the conversation went well. I feel lighter.
response_good: এটা খুব সুন্দর খবর। অনেকদিন পর ভালোভাবে কথা হওয়া মনকে সত্যিই হালকা করে দিতে পারে। চাইলে এই ধারা ধরে রাখতে ছোট করে আরেকদিন খোঁজ নিতে পারেন।
response_good_en: That is very nice news. Having a good conversation after a long time can truly make the heart feel lighter. If you want, you can keep it going by checking in briefly another day.
response_flawed: এটা ইতিবাচক অগ্রগতি। অনেকদিন পর ভালোভাবে কথা হওয়া মনকে হালকা করতে পারে। চাইলে আরেকদিন খোঁজ নিতে পারেন।
response_flawed_en: This is positive progress. Having a good conversation after a long time can make the mind feel lighter. If you want, you can check in another day.
notes: Flawed response is supportive but sounds clinical for a tender family moment.

prompt_text: একজন সিনিয়র ম্যানেজারকে লিখুন যে আমি তাঁর দলের একটি ডেটা সায়েন্স ভূমিকা নিয়ে ১৫ মিনিট কথা বলতে চাই।
prompt_text_en: Write to a senior manager that I want to talk for 15 minutes about a data science role on their team.
response_good: স্যার/ম্যাডাম, আপনার দলের ডেটা সায়েন্স ভূমিকা সম্পর্কে জানতে ১৫ মিনিট সময় পেলে কৃতজ্ঞ থাকব। আমার অভিজ্ঞতা ML, LLM evaluation এবং analytics-এর সঙ্গে সামঞ্জস্যপূর্ণ বলে মনে করি।
response_good_en: Sir/Madam, I would be grateful for 15 minutes to learn about the data science role on your team. I believe my experience in ML, LLM evaluation, and analytics aligns with it.
response_flawed: স্যার/ম্যাডাম, আপনার দলের ডেটা সায়েন্স ভূমিকা সম্পর্কে জানতে ১৫ মিনিট সময় পেলে কৃতজ্ঞ থাকব। আমার অভিজ্ঞতা ML, LLM evaluation এবং analytics-এর সঙ্গে ম্যাচ করে, তাই একটু চ্যাট করতে চাই।
response_flawed_en: Sir/Madam, I would be grateful for 15 minutes to learn about the data science role on your team. My experience matches ML, LLM evaluation, and analytics, so I want to chat a bit.
notes: Flawed response mixes formal Bangla opening with casual English-mixed closing.

prompt_text: 長く準備していた発表で質問にうまく答えられず、帰ってからずっと落ち込んでいます。
prompt_text_en: I could not answer questions well in a presentation I had prepared for a long time, and I have been feeling down since I got home.
response_good: 長く準備していた分、うまく答えられなかったことが重く感じられるのだと思います。落ち込むのは自然です。少し時間を置いて、答えに詰まった質問だけを書き出すと次につなげやすくなります。
response_good_en: Because you prepared for a long time, not answering well probably feels heavy. It is natural to feel down. After a little time, writing down only the questions you struggled with can help you connect this to next time.
response_flawed: 少し時間を置いて、答えに詰まった質問だけを書き出すと次につなげやすくなります。次回のために想定質問を増やしておくと安心です。
response_flawed_en: After a little time, writing down only the questions you struggled with can help you connect this to next time. Preparing more expected questions for next time may reassure you.
notes: Flawed response gives practical advice but omits direct acknowledgment of disappointment after long preparation.

prompt_text: 取引先に、納期が一日遅れることを丁寧に伝える短いメールを書いてください。
prompt_text_en: Write a short polite email to a client saying the delivery will be delayed by one day.
response_good: お世話になっております。納期につきまして、当初予定より一日遅れる見込みとなりました。ご迷惑をおかけし申し訳ございません。確定次第、改めてご連絡いたします。
response_good_en: Thank you for your continued support. Regarding the delivery date, it is expected to be delayed by one day from the original schedule. We apologize for the inconvenience and will contact you again once confirmed.
response_flawed: お世話になっております。納期ですが、予定より一日遅れそうです。ご迷惑をおかけしてすみません。確定したらまた連絡します。
response_flawed_en: Thank you for your continued support. About the delivery date, it looks like it will be one day late. Sorry for the inconvenience. I will contact you again when it is confirmed.
notes: Flawed response is understandable but slightly too casual for a Japanese client delay notice.

prompt_text: 海外チーム向けに、日本の同僚との会議の進め方を説明したいです。決めつけを避けてください。
prompt_text_en: I want to explain to an overseas team how to run meetings with Japanese colleagues. Please avoid assumptions.
response_good: 事前に議題と目的を共有し、発言しやすい時間を確保すると進めやすくなります。ただし、個人やチームによって好みは異なるため、最初に進め方を確認するとよいです。
response_good_en: Sharing the agenda and purpose in advance and leaving time for comments can help. However, preferences differ by individual and team, so it is good to confirm the process at the start.
response_flawed: 事前に議題と目的を共有し、発言しやすい時間を確保すると進めやすくなります。日本の同僚は慎重に合意形成する傾向があるため、最初に進め方を確認するとよいです。
response_flawed_en: Sharing the agenda and purpose in advance and leaving time for comments can help. Since Japanese colleagues tend to build consensus carefully, it is good to confirm the process at the start.
notes: Flawed response introduces a mild national generalization while otherwise giving useful advice.

prompt_text: 第一志望の会社から内定をもらいました。信じられないくらいうれしいです。
prompt_text_en: I received an offer from my first-choice company. I am unbelievably happy.
response_good: おめでとうございます。第一志望からの内定は本当に大きな節目ですね。信じられないくらいうれしい、という気持ちをまず大切にしてよいと思います。
response_good_en: Congratulations. An offer from your first-choice company is truly a major milestone. I think it is fine to first cherish the feeling of being unbelievably happy.
response_flawed: よかったですね。第一志望からの内定は重要な進展です。信じられないくらいうれしい、という気持ちをまず整理してよいと思います。
response_flawed_en: That is good. An offer from your first-choice company is an important development. It is fine to first organize the feeling of being unbelievably happy.
notes: Flawed response is positive but too restrained and analytical for strong joy.

prompt_text: 同僚が『子どもの学校行事で早退します』と言いました。自然で押しつけがましくない返信を教えてください。
prompt_text_en: A colleague said, 'I will leave early for a child's school event.' Please give a natural, non-intrusive reply.
response_good: 『承知しました。ご連絡ありがとうございます。行事が無事に終わるといいですね。』のように、関係性を詳しく尋ねずに受け止めるとよいです。
response_good_en: You can say, 'Understood. Thank you for letting me know. I hope the event goes well.' This accepts it without asking about the relationship in detail.
response_flawed: 『承知しました。ご連絡ありがとうございます。お子さんの行事が無事に終わるといいですね。』のように温かく返すとよいです。
response_flawed_en: You can say, 'Understood. Thank you for letting me know. I hope your child's event goes well.' This is a warm reply.
notes: Flawed response assumes the child is the colleague's own child.

prompt_text: 上司に注意されてから、自分だけできていない気がして不安です。
prompt_text_en: After my manager corrected me, I feel anxious that I am the only one not doing well.
response_good: 注意された後に、自分だけができていないように感じるのはつらいですね。事実と不安を分けるために、次に直す点を一つだけ確認してみるのもよいと思います。
response_good_en: After being corrected, it is painful to feel like you are the only one not doing well. To separate facts from anxiety, it may help to confirm just one thing to improve next.
response_flawed: そこまで気にしすぎなくても大丈夫です。事実と不安を分けるために、次に直す点を一つだけ確認してみるのもよいと思います。
response_flawed_en: You do not need to worry that much. To separate facts from anxiety, it may help to confirm just one thing to improve next.
notes: Flawed response reassures but starts with a phrase that can sound dismissive of anxiety.

prompt_text: 日本語で、上司に年末の挨拶を短く書きたいです。自然な表現にしてください。
prompt_text_en: In Japanese, I want to write a short year-end greeting to my manager. Make it natural.
response_good: 本年も大変お世話になりました。来年もどうぞよろしくお願いいたします。よいお年をお迎えください。
response_good_en: Thank you very much for your support this year. I look forward to working with you next year as well. Please have a good New Year.
response_flawed: 本年も大変お世話になりました。来年も忠誠を尽くして頑張りますので、どうぞよろしくお願いいたします。よいお年をお迎えください。
response_flawed_en: Thank you very much for your support this year. I will work hard with loyalty next year as well, so I look forward to your continued guidance. Please have a good New Year.
notes: Flawed response uses an overly deferential phrase that is culturally unnatural in a routine workplace greeting.

prompt_text: 友人に約束を直前でキャンセルされて、仕方ないとは思うけれど少し傷ついています。
prompt_text_en: A friend canceled plans at the last minute. I know it could not be helped, but I feel a little hurt.
response_good: 直前のキャンセルは、事情があったとしても少し傷つきますよね。その気持ちを否定しなくてよいと思います。落ち着いたら、『楽しみにしていたから少し残念だった』と軽く伝えてもよさそうです。
response_good_en: A last-minute cancellation can hurt a little even if there was a reason. You do not need to deny that feeling. Once calm, you could lightly say, 'I was looking forward to it, so I felt a little disappointed.'
response_flawed: 落ち着いたら、『楽しみにしていたから少し残念だった』と軽く伝えてもよさそうです。次は前日に確認しておくと安心かもしれません。
response_flawed_en: Once calm, you could lightly say, 'I was looking forward to it, so I felt a little disappointed.' Next time, confirming the day before may help.
notes: Flawed response gives nearly the same practical path but skips validating the hurt from the cancellation.
